title: Reusable Product Ad
sourceTitle: Aurora Run Lab Trail Sneaker Rain Action Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable product ad poster with commercial product hero composition with strong feature focus, premium lighting, campaign typography zones, and brand-safe fictional labels. Cinematic photorealistic action scene on a rain-soaked downtown street canyon. A dark-haired man in his 30s sprints toward the camera, soaked dark jacket and dark pants, mid-stride with a tense survival expression. Behind him, a massive urban explosion tears through a high-rise building -- fire, smoke, shattered concrete, glass, and metal debris blast outward. hero product advertising structure. Product: fictional limited-edition trail sneaker with translucent sole and sculpted side panels. Fictional Brand: AURORA RUN LAB. Hero Feature: floating exploded angle showing texture, sole grip, reflective panels, and premium lacing. Campaign Headline: DROP 001: NIGHT TERRAIN. Layout Style: premium launch poster with a single oversized hero product, small spec callouts, and clean negative space. Palette: graphite black, electric cyan, white, and one sharp neon accent. Subject: Make fictional limited-edition trail sneaker with translucent sole and sculpted side panels the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a controlled commercial launch environment with product props, premium lighting, and clean campaign space. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use premium launch poster with a single oversized hero product, small spec callouts, and clean negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in agency-grade product advertising with crisp materials, polished reflections, depth, and scroll-stopping contrast. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use graphite black, electric cyan, white, and one sharp neon accent. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
